channel.title: The Daily AI Shift — Chemical Engineering x AI
channel.description: Daily AI intelligence for Australian chemical engineers

item.title: AI in Australian Chemical Engineering: Process Simulation Upgrades, AI Job Cuts, and ChemE Careers at an Inflection Point
item.description: DeepSeek V3.2 unlocks new simulation co-pilot possibilities. Anthropic opens a Sydney office. Australian industrial employers cut roles as AI reshapes operations. What it means for process engineers and ChemE students.

item.title: AI Agents in the Plant: Autonomous Commerce, Safety Surges, and What Chemical Engineers Need to Know
item.description: AI scheming surges fivefold — a warning for safety-critical industries. Claude goes mobile with engineering tool integrations. What autonomous AI agents mean for plant operations and ChemE graduates.

item.title: GPT-5.4, Gemini 3 Deep Think, and DeepSeek V4: What the New Frontier Models Mean for Chemical Engineers
item.description: Three flagship AI models launch in 48 hours. Better reasoning, cheaper inference, open weights — and direct implications for process simulation, materials research, and ChemE graduates choosing tools.
